note: Frozen Lexeme Registry (R-010, R-022 broad freeze). Lexical islands exempt from strict templates; their roots still derive regularly. The 99 divine Names enter wholesale at the liturgical tranche.

frozen.gloss: late-night vigil (the split night, per the app)
Friday — day of gathering (Pillar; Calendar Layer 3)
Saturday — the axial day (Pillar; no line; Psalm 92)
God — the frozen form of frozen forms
in the name of God (opening formula)
cyclical eternity — the returning forever; the Great Year runs in it

names99: The 99 divine Names are frozen wholesale (R-022, R-040) with their al- article (R-012). Canonical enumeration BY REFERENCE to the Oracle's ratified 99 Names Registry (shared-table constitution — one table, consumed everywhere; docs/01-ORACLE-DECK-AND-99-NAMES.md §6). Native-gloss pairings grow in the lexicon: Al-Ḥayy~ʿanīḫ · Al-Wāsiʿ~wasīʿ · Al-Karīm~karīm · As-Salām~salām · Al-Ḥaqq~ḥaqq · Al-Quddūs~qadīs · Ar-Raḥīm~raḥīm · Al-Malik~malik · Al-ʿAlīm~ʿalīm · Al-Ḥakīm~ḥakīm (10 of 99).
